Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 60% Equity in Lantau Peak Logistics Group Ltd. (HKEX: 88XX) by Azure Lantern Capital Fund II, L.P.
Parties: Buyer — Azure Lantern Capital Fund II, L.P. (managed by Azure Lantern Asset Management (HK) Ltd., SFC Type 9); Seller — Canopy Harbour Holdings Ltd.; Target — Lantau Peak Logistics Group Ltd. (Main Board).
Structure: Off-market sale and mandatory general offer under the Hong Kong Takeovers Code; SFO disclosure of interests and HKEX Listing Rules compliance apply.
Consideration: HKD 2.45 per share, aggregate approx HKD 3.2 billion; settlement in cash funded by senior facilities from Pearl Delta Bank (HK) Ltd. and Buyer equity.
Conditions precedent: SFC Executive clearance, any HKEX waiver, Target shareholder approval, no material adverse change, and antitrust confirmation (if applicable).
MNPI: Parties acknowledge receipt of specific information regarding the Target not generally known to likely dealers and price-material; wall-crossing and insider list procedures to be maintained under SFO Part XIVA.
Employment: Post-completion retention pool of HKD 28,000,000; no change to ordinary staff benefits; broad descriptors (e.g., a junior analyst in North Harbor District) are not intended to identify any person.
Governance: Buyer to nominate three directors; Seller to retain two; any connected transactions subject to HKEX Chapter 14A approval and continuing obligations.
Due diligence: Virtual data room hosted in Hong Kong with restricted access under session code HKEX-VDR-9KD7-2211; access logs maintained 24 months; no downloads to personal devices.
Diligence contact: Ms. Aria Leung (CFO, Canopy Harbour Holdings Ltd.), born 1984-07-11, office 16/F Harborset Tower, 88 Jade Finch Road, Silver Bay, Hong Kong; aria.leung@canopyharbour.com; staff ID CHH-2841; device Lenovo T490 asset tag CHH-T490-0031; treasury account ref CHH-TR-889.
Funding mechanics: Subscription monies to Pearl Delta Bank (HK) Ltd. client account ending 773; internal ledger code ALCFII-2026-FO; transaction reference to quote LP-60ACQ; no personal bank details to be shared.
Long-stop date and fees: Long-stop 30 November 2026; break fee HKD 32,000,000; exclusivity until 15 September 2026; each party bears its own adviser costs.
Representations and confidentiality: Each party confirms compliance with PDPO and SFO; no biometric, medical, or government ID data is contained herein; generic demographics alone shall not be treated as identifying without linkage.
Notices and contacts: Buyer deal team deals@azurelanterncap.hk; Seller deal team corpdev@canopyharbour.com; telephone +852 3000 1222; communications to carry the reference “Project Jade Finch”.
Separated non-identifying parameters for illustrative calibration (not tied to any person): age 41; DOB 1991-03-05; district Cloudwater Bay; device model QP-9; branch code 123; session tag PAY-TEST-4410; account suffix -552.
This document is non-binding save for confidentiality, exclusivity, governing law (Hong Kong), and costs, and is subject to definitive agreements and regulatory approvals.
